reviews.comment:
Si bien lo conozco de hace muchos años, creo que tendrían que actualizarlo poner baños más modernos, muchas gente viaja al litoral y me parece que ya es hora de poner la estación que sea moderna y útil para todos los socios que viajamos

(Translated by Google)
Although I've known it for many years, I think they should update it, install more modern restrooms. Many people travel to the coast, and I think it's time to make the station modern and useful for all the members who travel there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQeE1feHJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención del playero excelente pero la estación muy pobre. No tiene ypf full para comer ni casi nada

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants' service was excellent, but the resort was very poor. It doesn't have a full YPF restaurant or much of anything else.
